creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
For the upcoming Tor Browser Bundle port I need the same set of
mirrors Tor daemon uses. This would also help if someone creates a port
for Torbirdy, Vidalia bundle or any new child project in the future.

https://trillian.chruetertee.ch/freebsd-gecko/browser/trunk/www/linux-tor-browser

Fix: Note, tor-package-archive sometimes provides betas for TBB before actual release.

 Mk/bsd.sites.mk             |   45 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 net-mgmt/vidalia/Makefile   |    6 -----
 security/tor-devel/Makefile |   39 --------------------------------------
 security/tor/Makefile       |   41 ----------------------------------------
 www/xpi-torbutton/Makefile  |    2 -
 5 files changed, 49 insertions(+), 84 deletions(-)
